title: thuja pyramidalis f. stricta
intro: Thuja pyramidalis f. stricta, also known as strict thuja or Eastern Arborvitae, is a variant of the Thuja pyramidalis plant, characterized by its narrow, upright growth habit. The medicinal properties of Thuja pyramidalis f. stricta include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like thujone and bornyl acetate. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Thuja pyramidalis f. stricta can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, or applied topically to affected areas.
